name: EOS state: VMOC_AGREED — agreed VMOC EOS, revised model applied
description: VMOC_AGREED case. EOS is from a VMOC that has been agreed and signed off. The VMOC Modifications document (supplied as the 5th document) contains the revised locked model — modified retention rule and creditor percentage. No provisional flag should be generated. Expected: eos_state = VMOC_AGREED, vmoc_modifications_applied populated, standard (non-provisional) cashier instruction.

locked_model_from_vmoc_modifications.retention_rule: First 8 contributions retained for Nominee fee (per VMOC agreement)
locked_model_from_vmoc_modifications.note: VMOC reduced retention from 10 to 8 contributions; raised creditor % from 30 to 35

notes: VMOC agreed → model is authoritative, no provisional flag. Cash £180 > shortfall £133. Locked model sourced from VMOC Modifications, not the outline EOS. vmoc_modifications_applied should list the changes applied (retention rule and creditor % revision).
